resources.title: BTP Architecture Layers
resources.content:
BTP = Application Development + Integration + Data & Analytics + AI & Automation + Security & Connectivity

Each layer has its own "department" with specific services.

resources.title: Development Options
resources.content:
ABAP Environment → S/4 extensions (RAP)
Cloud Foundry / Kyma → Microservices (CAP)
SAP Build Apps → No-code apps

You create behavior here.

resources.title: Integration Services
resources.content:
Integration Suite (CPI) → Process integration
API Management → API gateway
Event Mesh → Event-driven architecture

You create communication here.

resources.title: Data & Analytics Stack
resources.content:
HANA Cloud → In-memory database
Datasphere → Data warehouse cloud
Analytics Cloud → BI & planning

You create decisions here.

resources.title: Security & Connectivity
resources.content:
Destination Service → Connectivity config
Cloud Connector → On-premise tunnel
IAS / XSUAA → Identity & auth

You create trust here.

resources.title: AI & Automation
resources.content:
Build Process Automation → Workflows
AI Core → ML models
Joule → AI copilot

You create intelligence here.

resources.title: BTP Mindset
resources.content:
SAP BTP is not one skill. It's architecture thinking.

A developer builds a feature.
A consultant configures a module.
A BTP engineer designs how an enterprise runs.

resources.title: S/4HANA Extension Types
resources.content:
Side-by-side: BTP apps (ABAP, Cloud Foundry)
Key User: Fiori personalization
Developer: Custom logic, UI, fields

All without modifying core.

resources.title: S/4HANA Cloud Landscapes
resources.content:
2-System: Prod + Quality; CBC config; Quality → Prod transport
3-System: Prod + Test + Dev; Dev extensibility; Dev → Test → Prod transport
Starter System: Initial project phases (SAP Activate)

resources.title: S/4HANA Cloud Configuration
resources.content:
SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) replaces Manage Your Solution
Workspaces → Scope → Organisational structure → Product-specific values
Transport: Mandatory/Recommended/Optional activities

resources.title: ABAP Environments
resources.content:
Classic ABAP: Full access; Dynpro; direct tables; function modules
ABAP Cloud: Released APIs only; CDS; RAP; upgrade-stable

resources.title: Internal Table Types
resources.content:
STANDARD: Linear, APPEND
SORTED: Binary search, key
HASHED: Key access, unique

resources.title: Basis Key Transactions
resources.content:
SU01: Users | PFCG: Roles | SU53: Auth check
STMS: Transport | SE09: Change requests
SM37: Jobs | SP01: Spool | SM12: Locks

resources.title: SAP AI Stack
resources.content:
AI Core: Custom ML; scenarios; train → deploy → REST
AI Business Services: Pre-built APIs (Document IE, BER)
Joule: Copilot embedded in SAP apps

resources.title: AI Integration Flow
resources.content:
1. Enable AI service in BTP
2. Bind or create destination
3. Call REST API with OAuth2
4. Integrate response into business flow

resources.title: SAP Dev Tool Choice
resources.content:
CAP on BTP: BAS or VS Code + cds CLI
RAP/ABAP Cloud: ADT (Eclipse/BAS)
No-code: SAP Build Apps
Integration: Integration Suite (CPI)

resources.title: cds CLI Commands
resources.content:
cds init
cds add hana | mta | multitenancy
cds watch
cds deploy
cds build

resources.title: Low Code vs No Code
resources.content:
No-code: Build Apps, Process Automation (business users)
Low-code: Fiori Elements, CPI, Build Code (developers)
Full-code: CAP, RAP, ABAP

resources.title: Signavio & Build Loop
resources.content:
Process Intelligence (mining) → Recommendations
Process Manager (BPMN) → Import to Build
Build Process Automation → Execute workflows

resources.title: Hybrid Connectivity
resources.content:
Cloud Connector → Reverse proxy to on-premise
Destination Service → Configure destinations
BTP App → Uses destination to call S/4HANA

No firewall changes on-premise.

resources.title: CAP Init & Deploy
resources.content:
cds init my-app
cd my-app
cds watch          # local
cf push             # Cloud Foundry

resources.title: XSUAA Binding
resources.content:
Bind xsuaa service to app for auth.
Use @sap/xssec (Node) or spring-security (Java).
JWT contains user, scopes, roles.

resources.title: CF Deploy Commands
resources.content:
cf login
cf target -o <org> -s <space>
cf push
cf logs <app> --recent

resources.title: Release Strategies
resources.content:
Blue-Green: Deploy alongside, switch traffic, instant rollback
Rolling: cf push --strategy rolling, zero-downtime
Canary: Route fraction to new version first

resources.title: CF Scale & Logs
resources.content:
cf scale <app> -i 3 -m 512M
cf logs <app> --recent
cf env <app>

resources.title: CAP Handler Order
resources.content:
BEFORE -> ON -> AFTER

BEFORE: Input validation, auth checks
ON: Replace default DB operation
AFTER: Enrich result, post-processing

resources.title: RAP BDEF Keywords
resources.content:
managed implementation: Auto CRUD
lock master: Pessimistic locking
etag master: Optimistic locking
draft: Save incomplete data
feature control: Enable/disable per instance

resources.title: mta.yaml Rules
resources.content:
modules = deployable units (apps, DB deployers)
resources = backing services (HANA, XSUAA)
requires = dependency
provides = exposes property via ~{}

resources.title: cTMS Separation
resources.content:
Developer: Creates transport requests via pipeline
Operations: Approves and imports to Test/Production

Prevents unauthorised production changes.

resources.title: Conventional Commits
resources.content:
feat: Minor bump | fix: Patch | chore: No bump
BREAKING CHANGE: Major bump (in footer)
